name: Nikki Haley
role: U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations
summary: Former UN Ambassador and South Carolina Governor who ran against Trump in the 2024 GOP primary, then said he needed to earn her voters and later said she would vote for him.

keyStatements.quote: It's now up to Donald Trump to earn the votes of those in our party who did not support him.
I will be voting for Trump.
keyStatements.context: Remarks after dropping out of the GOP primary

timeline.significance: First female and minority governor of SC

timeline.event: Said she would vote for Trump

credibility.background: Former UN Ambassador, Governor of South Carolina, daughter of immigrants, 2024 presidential candidate
positions: U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations (2017-2018)
Member, South Carolina House of Representatives (2005-2011)

oppositionReasons: Said Trump needed to earn the votes of Republicans who did not support him
Withheld endorsement when suspending her campaign
endorsement: Said she would vote for Trump on 2024-05-22

sources.title: Nikki Haley suspends her presidential campaign
Nikki Haley says she will vote for Trump
